notes: Big Nose Freaks Out is a sequel to Big Nose the Caveman (1991). Wikipedia identifies composers for the original game as Allister Brimble and Matthew Grey, but no specific audio/music documentation is available for Big Nose Freaks Out itself. The Cutting Room Floor source contained only deletion notices with no substantive audio content. No tempo, key, chord progression, SFX characteristics, or per-area audio data could be extracted from available documentation.
